title: padus avium var. aurea
intro: Padus avium var. aurea, commonly known as Golden Alder, is a variety of the Alder tree, characterized by its golden-yellow foliage and slender branches. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Golden Alder include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Golden Alder can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
